name: Natalia Kudryavtseva
title: Senior Frontend / Software Engineer
tagline: Building modern web applications with focus on performance, accessibility, and exceptional user experience. Specialized in React/Next.js ecosystem and design systems.
about: Senior Frontend Engineer with expertise in building scalable web applications and design systems. I focus on delivering high-performance, accessible solutions that balance technical excellence with user needs. My work spans from architecting component libraries to optimizing production applications for millions of users.

projects.title: MyDiary
projects.subtitle: Personal Health & Productivity Tracker
projects.description: Full-stack web application for habit tracking, daily planning, and health monitoring with PWA capabilities.
highlights: Built complete CRUD system with API routes and database schema design
Implemented PWA with offline support and cache versioning
Created editable card system with real-time updates
Deployed production-ready app on Vercel with CI/CD pipeline

projects.title: Roberto / OpenClaw

Designed command interface for seamless voice-to-action automation
Optimized transcription performance for real-time use cases
